utterance:
{
  "utterance": "We're going to build the 'EcoGuardian' app, a revolutionary platform that uses AI to monitor and protect endangered species in real-time. With EcoGuardian, we can save the planet one animal at a time.",
  "title": "EcoGuardian",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "EcoGuardian leverages cutting-edge AI to provide real-time monitoring and protection for endangered species, addressing a critical social issue with innovative technology.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Imagine a digital canvas that allows users to explore the inner workings of their emotions through generative art, fostering self-awareness and emotional intelligence. This is EmoSketch, where every stroke is a reflection of your inner state.",
  "title": "EmoSketch: Emotional Generative Art",
  "track": "T03",
  "core_insight": "EmoSketch uniquely combines emotional self-awareness with generative art, offering a novel way to visualize and understand one's emotions through interactive and aesthetically pleasing means.",
  "your_role": "designer"
}

{
  "utterance": "Let us build a platform that amplifies the voices of marginalized communities, ensuring their stories are heard and valued. This platform will not only provide a space for expression but also offer tools for advocacy and support.",
  "title": "Voice Amplifier",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "Voice Amplifier uniquely combines a robust communication platform with integrated advocacy tools, empowering marginalized voices and providing a measurable impact in terms of increased visibility and support for these communities.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Transforming urban air quality with a self-driving drone fleet that monitors and cleans pollution in real-time.",
  "title": "AirGuardian Drone Fleet",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "Utilizing autonomous drones equipped with advanced sensors and cleaning technologies to provide real-time air quality monitoring and pollution mitigation, addressing environmental and health concerns in urban areas.",
  "your_role": "Tech Lead"
}
